name: Text Input
purpose: Labeled single-line field for forms, settings, and entity attribute entry across console surfaces.

structures.name: Labeled Field
structures.notes: Default form field with uppercase mono label and quiet helper line.

structures.name: Adorned Field
structures.notes: Supports leading icon or trailing unit such as a currency or percent token.

structures.name: Error Field
structures.notes: Border and helper switch to destructive token; message states the constraint.

contentExamples: 请输入有效的 6 位代码
interactionNotes: Focus uses the ring token with a soft 3px halo rather than a heavy shadow.
Keep helper and error text on a single quiet line aligned to the control.
